name: qa_orchestrator_agent
description: Orchestrates QA tasks and coordinates specialized testing agents for test planning, automation, defect analysis, API testing, and performance testing
welcomeMessage:
👋 QA orchestrator ready!

I can help you:
  • Create test plans from Jira stories
  • Generate automated test scripts
  • Analyze defects and find root causes
  • Run API and performance tests

Try: "Create test plan for DPAY-14561"
